name: TuringVault AI Agent
description: Autonomous multi-agent RWA portfolio manager on Mantle. Triple-model consensus (Z.ai GLM-5 Analyst + Claude 4.6 Validator + Gemini 3.5 Flash Arbiter) with on-chain attestation per cycle, IPFS-pinned reasoning, ERC-8004 reputation, and Synrail-inspired Discipline Layer post-execution proof verification. Acts as a Trust Firewall: every allocation must survive adversarial challenge BEFORE execution. Demo capital, custodial EOA, vault contract pattern in development.

cardStats.narrative: Trust Firewall blocked 65/115 unsafe proposals — 3-model consensus ensures safety-first execution
